glosses.ja: ハンサムな; きれいな

sentences.target: Mi hermano está muy guapo hoy.

translations.es: Mi hermano está muy guapo hoy.
translations.en: My brother looks very handsome today.
translations.fr: Mon frère est très beau aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Mein Bruder sieht heute sehr gut aus.
translations.it: Mio fratello è molto bello oggi.
translations.ko: 내 남동생은 오늘 정말 멋있어 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥今天看起来很帅。
translations.yue: 我細佬今日睇落好靚仔。
translations.pt: Meu irmão está muito bonito hoje.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi hôm nay rất đẹp trai.
translations.nl: Mijn broer ziet er vandaag erg knap uit.
translations.hu: A bátyám ma nagyon jól néz ki.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई आज बहुत हैंडसम लग रहा है।
translations.pl: Mój brat wygląda dziś bardzo przystojnie.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου είναι πολύ όμορφος σήμερα.
translations.nb: Broren min ser veldig kjekk ut i dag.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya terlihat sangat tampan hari ini.
translations.sv: Min bror ser väldigt snygg ut i dag.
translations.ro: Fratele meu arată foarte bine azi.
translations.cs: Můj bratr dnes vypadá moc hezky.
translations.da: Min bror ser meget flot ud i dag.
translations.ja: 私の兄は今日はとてもかっこいいです。

tokens.explanation: Determiner introducing a possessive relation; agrees in person/number with the possessor.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Auxiliary/copular verb in present indicative, third person singular.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective that follows.
Attributive adjective predicated of the subject through the copular verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Ese chico es guapo y tímido.

translations.es: Ese chico es guapo y tímido.
translations.en: That boy is handsome and shy.
translations.fr: Ce garçon est beau et timide.
translations.de: Der Junge ist hübsch und schüchtern.
translations.it: Quel ragazzo è bello e timido.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个男孩很帅，也很害羞。
translations.yue: 嗰個男仔好靚仔，又好怕醜。
translations.pt: Esse menino é bonito e tímido.
translations.vi: Cậu bé đó đẹp trai và nhút nhát.
translations.nl: Die jongen is knap en verlegen.
translations.hu: Az a fiú jóképű és félénk.
translations.hi: वह लड़का हैंडसम और शर्मीला है।
translations.pl: Tamten chłopak jest przystojny i nieśmiały.
translations.el: Αυτό το αγόρι είναι όμορφο και ντροπαλό.
translations.nb: Den gutten er kjekk og sjenert.
translations.id: Anak laki-laki itu tampan dan pemalu.
translations.sv: Den där pojken är snygg och blyg.
translations.ro: Băiatul acela este frumos și timid.
translations.cs: Ten chlapec je hezký a plachý.
translations.da: Den dreng er flot og genert.
translations.fi: Tuo poika on komea ja ujo.
translations.ja: あの少年はかっこよくて内気です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary in present indicative, third person singular.
Predicate adjective describing the subject.
Coordinating conjunction linking two adjectives.
Second coordinated predicate adjective describing the same subject.

sentences.target: Mi vecino parece guapo sin barba.

translations.es: Mi vecino parece guapo sin barba.
translations.en: My neighbor looks handsome without a beard.
translations.fr: Mon voisin a l'air beau sans barbe.
translations.de: Mein Nachbar sieht ohne Bart gut aus.
translations.it: Il mio vicino sembra bello senza barba.
translations.ko: 제 이웃은 수염이 없으니 잘생겨 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的邻居没留胡子时看起来很帅。
translations.yue: 我個鄰居冇鬚嗰陣睇落好靚仔。
translations.ru: Мой сосед выглядит красивым без бороды.
translations.pt: Meu vizinho parece bonito sem barba.
translations.he: השכן שלי נראה חתיך בלי זקן.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của tôi trông đẹp trai khi không có râu.
translations.ar: جاري يبدو وسيماً من دون لحية.
translations.nl: Mijn buurman ziet er zonder baard goed uit.
translations.uk: Мій сусід без бороди виглядає гарно.
translations.hu: A szomszédom szakáll nélkül jól néz ki.
translations.hi: मेरा पड़ोसी दाढ़ी के बिना हैंडसम लगता है।
translations.pl: Mój sąsiad bez brody wygląda przystojnie.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς μου φαίνεται όμορφος χωρίς γενιάδα.
translations.nb: Naboen min ser kjekk ut uten skjegg.
translations.id: Tetangga saya terlihat tampan tanpa janggut.
translations.sv: Min granne ser snygg ut utan skägg.
translations.ro: Vecinul meu arată bine fără barbă.
translations.cs: Můj soused vypadá bez vousů hezky.
translations.da: Min nabo ser flot ud uden skæg.
translations.ja: うちの隣人はひげがないとハンサムに見えます。

tokens.explanation: Determiner introducing a possessive relation.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular; expresses appearance or seeming.
Predicative adjective complement of the verb 'parecer'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of absence/privation.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition.

translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je te trouve plus beau.
translations.de: Heute finde ich, dass du hübscher aussiehst.
translations.pt: Hoje eu te acho mais bonito.
translations.he: היום אתה נראה לי חתיך יותר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi thấy bạn đẹp trai hơn.
translations.hi: आज तुम मुझे ज़्यादा हैंडसम लग रहे हो।
translations.nb: I dag synes jeg du ser kjekkere ut.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu terlihat lebih tampan.
translations.sv: I dag tycker jag att du ser snyggare ut.
translations.ro: Azi mi se pare că arăți mai bine.
translations.da: I dag synes jeg, du ser flottere ud.
translations.ja: 今日はあなたがもっとかっこよく見えます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Clitic personal pronoun functioning as the direct object of the verb; surface form is an unstressed clitic.
Main verb in present indicative, first person singular.
Comparative degree adverb modifying the adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the person addressed or seen.
